response.justification: While Bogdan has strong general software engineering fundamentals and excellent communication skills, he lacks critical mandatory requirements: meaningful C++ experience (only 6 months in 2014-2015), zero financial services or capital markets domain exposure, and no Windows platform specialization. The resume shows a career trajectory focused on modern web stack (Node.js, TypeScript, React) rather than systems programming or financial software development. This is insufficient for a mid-senior capital markets C++ role.
strengths: Strong communication and mentoring abilities demonstrated through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
Solid CI/CD and DevOps expertise with GitLab, Docker, and deployment infrastructure
Java development experience and proven ability to quickly learn diverse programming paradigms
concerns: Minimal C++ experience limited to 6 months at National Instruments in 2014, now 10+ years outdated
Zero exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains—critical for the role
Career strongly oriented toward modern web stack (Node.js, TypeScript, React, MongoDB) rather than systems programming or financial software
